rackets.name: Pro Staff RF97 Autograph
rackets.description: The racket of Roger Federer. Exceptional feel and precision for advanced players who demand total control.

rackets.name: Babolat Pure Aero
rackets.description: Rafael Nadal's weapon. Aerodynamic frame generates brutal topspin and explosive power from the baseline.

rackets.name: Head Speed Pro
rackets.description: Novak Djokovic's choice. Balanced blend of speed, control and comfort for aggressive all-court players.

rackets.name: Yonex EZONE 98
rackets.description: Isometric head shape expands the sweet spot. Incredible power with surprising comfort on every shot.

rackets.name: Tecnifibre TF-X1 300
rackets.description: Perfect entry point for players stepping up their game. Light, forgiving and loaded with power for all court levels.

rackets.name: Prince Textreme Tour 100P
rackets.description: Textreme carbon fibre delivers unmatched stability. Surgically precise for players who live at the net.

rackets.name: Dunlop CX 200
rackets.description: Sonic Core technology absorbs vibration while maintaining crisp feedback. A player's racket through and through.

rackets.name: Babolat Pure Drive
rackets.description: The world's best-selling racket. Effortless power and spin from any position on the court.

rackets.name: Wilson Clash 100 Pro
rackets.description: FreeFlex technology bends in every direction to produce effortless power with tour-level control and comfort.

rackets.name: Head Radical MP
rackets.description: Andre Agassi's legend reborn. Graphene 360 offers a perfect mix of power and feel for the modern baseliner.

rackets.name: Yonex VCore Pro 97
rackets.description: Hyper MG frame delivers sharp precision and buttery feel. Loved by professionals for its exceptional touch.

rackets.name: Tecnifibre T-Fight RS 300
rackets.description: RS technology reduces shock and vibration for a smooth, comfortable experience. Ideal for recreational players.
